title: clitoria falcata f. heteromorpha
intro: Clitoria falcata f. heteromorpha, also known as the Butterfly Pea or Asian Pigeonwings, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Clitoria falcata f. heteromorpha include potential improvements in cardiovascular health, cognitive function, and eye health, although further research is needed to confirm these benefits. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and flowers being used to make herbal preparations for medicinal purposes.
